belier.author: Sibylle
belier.intro: Aries, this Jupiter-ruled Thursday widens your martial horizon and invites you to think bigger without scattering your fire. The Sun in Taurus keeps teaching you the patience that makes your bursts of energy last longer. You can set an ambitious intention today and walk its first concrete step before evening.
belier.love: A shared project can take on a new dimension if you dare to share a vision wider than usual. In a couple, talk about a trip, a move or a common dream that has been quietly ripening. Single, your frank enthusiasm draws someone with bright eyes and an open mind toward you.
belier.work: A file finally seems to unstick thanks to support from a mentor or a well-placed partner. You can use the Jupiterian optimism to propose an idea you had been keeping in reserve for weeks. A training opportunity or a professional trip deserves your attention in the early afternoon.
belier.energy: Expansive, confident energy that wants to spend itself in fresh air and wide spaces. An outdoor activity recharges you better than a closed gym today.
belier.intuition: A vision wider than your usual day shows up around midday and deserves to be taken seriously. Note the hunch that returns twice this morning, it is saying something essential.
belier.mantra: I aim high and walk one step at a time.

taureau.author: Sibylle
taureau.intro: Taurus, the Sun in your sign meets Jupiter today and amplifies everything you set, plant or decide. This Thursday gives you the rightful sense of having earned what is now coming to you. You can fully savor a quiet success without having to justify it to anyone around you.
taureau.love: A gift, a concrete attention or a felt declaration nourishes your bond with a particular warmth today. In a couple, celebrate a small shared victory with a careful meal or a ritual you create. Single, you radiate a dense presence that captivates without you needing to force anything at all.
taureau.work: A promotion, a contract or a financial recognition is ripening favorably under Jupiter's kind eye today. You can ask for what you deserve with a settled, fair assurance, without overplaying your hand. A long-term investment calls for thought, but the horizon is encouraging this Thursday.
taureau.energy: Wide, lively energy, perfect for a friendly meal and an outdoor activity. Your body also appreciates a bit of softness and slowness as the day ends.
taureau.intuition: Your bodily sense validates good news before your mind has fully decoded it. Trust the inner smile that spreads through you in the middle of the morning.
taureau.mantra: I receive with gratitude what grows in me.

gemeaux.author: Sibylle
gemeaux.intro: Gemini, this Jupiterian Thursday widens your mental playground and offers conversations deeper than usual. The Sun in Taurus still invites you to choose one direction within the swirl of your ideas. You can pair quickness of mind and breadth of view for a few precious, fertile hours.
gemeaux.love: A philosophical or existential discussion enriches your relationship with a new flavor today. In a couple, dare a topic you have been holding close for a long time without truly bringing it up. Single, a cultural or intellectual encounter sparks an attraction grounded in the quality of the exchange.
gemeaux.work: You can present, teach or write content more ambitious than what you practiced this week. Your pen gains in altitude and your speech in reach under today's Jupiterian influence. An international or cross-cultural project tempts you with good reason and deserves a few hours of study.
gemeaux.energy: Joyful, expansive energy that loves to vary companies and landscapes through the day. A long walk feeds your body as much as your mind today.
gemeaux.intuition: A book or a sentence overheard by chance opens an unexpected angle today. Stay attentive to the books, podcasts or words that cross your path this morning.
gemeaux.mantra: I link my ideas to a wide horizon.

cancer.author: Sibylle
cancer.intro: Cancer, the waning Moon in Capricorn asks you today to structure your emotional flow without bridling it. The Jupiterian Thursday brings a touch of warmth and amplitude to your usually intimate sky. You can open your bubble to a slightly wider circle without fearing you will dissolve in it.
cancer.love: A loved one far away geographically gets back in touch or fills your thoughts with a tender presence today. In a couple, talk about family, roots or a home project that is gently ripening between you. Single, an encounter through a wider circle can take on an almost familial dimension.
cancer.work: You can consolidate a professional foundation that seemed fragile to you not long ago. An institutional or administrative support unblocks favorably under Jupiter's influence today. A question of professional housing or domestic work setup deserves your morning attention.
cancer.energy: Soft but sustained energy, recharged by a warm hearth or a family meal. Your body appreciates slow cooking and a nourishing plate today.
cancer.intuition: A dream from the night gives you a precious indication, provided you note it on waking. Your sensitivity catches an underground movement that will confirm itself in the coming days.
cancer.mantra: I open my inner home with confidence.

lion.author: Sibylle
lion.intro: Leo, this Jupiterian Thursday echoes your solar nature and naturally amplifies your radiance for the day. The Sun in Taurus invites you, however, to channel that energy into concrete projects rather than mere display. You can shine usefully by putting your flame at the service of a cause slightly larger than you.
lion.love: A generous declaration or a just-right theatrical gesture rekindles your shared flame today. In a couple, plan an outing that breaks your routine and brings grandeur into the everyday. Single, your charisma draws kind glances today, sometimes from further away than usual.
lion.work: A public recognition, a moment in the spotlight or a wider responsibility may be offered to you today. You can accept with a quiet dignity, taking the time to gauge the real commitment involved. A creative project benefits from being presented in the early afternoon to the right person.
lion.energy: Vibrant, warm energy that loves to be seen and heard with joy. A group sports activity or a collective class galvanizes you more than a solitary workout.
lion.intuition: A compliment received this morning carries precious information about the direction to follow. Your heart knows how to recognize true opportunities when they arrive with warmth and clarity.
lion.mantra: I shine in service of something larger.

vierge.author: Sibylle
vierge.intro: Virgo, the Taurean Sun and Jupiter dialogue harmoniously with your sign this Thursday. Mercury, your ruler, helps you order an expansion that could otherwise overflow you a little. You can concretely organize a wider vision without letting go of the precision that reassures you.
vierge.love: You can express a long-held feeling in a simple, precise form that touches deeply. In a couple, gentle planning of a six-month project brings real serenity to your bond. Single, someone notices the finesse of your attention far more than you currently believe.
vierge.work: A training, a book or a professional encounter widens your technical horizon today. You can refine a working method that felt good but lacked breath in recent weeks. A complex file gains from being structured during the calmest stretch of your morning.
vierge.energy: Settled, precise energy, ideal for a deep clean or a contemplative walk. Your body appreciates healthy food and steady hours today.
vierge.intuition: A detail noted almost absent-mindedly carries an important key to reread tonight. Your trained eye catches signs that others would walk right past without noticing.
vierge.mantra: I serve the great by tending the small.

balance.author: Sibylle
balance.intro: Libra, this Jupiterian Thursday brings a particularly happy sociability to your Venusian sky. The Taurean Sun resonates beautifully with your taste for shared beauty and harmony. You can orchestrate a meeting, a lunch or an exchange that will delight several people at once.
balance.love: A heart-to-heart conversation untangles an imbalance that had quietly weighed on your bond for some time. In a couple, suggest a shared cultural activity that nourishes the eyes and the heart equally. Single, a friendship can take on a sentimental tint during a well-chosen group outing.
balance.work: A partnership takes shape or confirms itself with particularly encouraging warmth today. You can close a two-signature agreement with the fairness that defines you in such moments. A mediation between two colleagues finds you more effective than a frontal intervention.
balance.energy: Sociable, airy energy, recharged by beautiful places and quality company. A gentle yoga session or a stretch with a partner relaxes you fully today.
balance.intuition: An asymmetry felt within a relationship carries the important information to take into account. Your inner barometer has long known what your mind is now ready to name clearly.
balance.mantra: I make every encounter a fair moment.

scorpion.author: Sibylle
scorpion.intro: Scorpio, the waning Moon prepares your sign for a deep inner cleansing you can begin today. Jupiter on this Thursday amplifies your transformative powers and invites you to think bigger about your inner work. You can let go of what has weighed too long with a lightness that may surprise you.
scorpion.love: A truth held back for a long time looks for words in a climate today favorable to mutual listening. In a couple, dare to name what is shifting inside you without dramatizing or hiding it shyly. Single, an old attraction resurfaces and deserves to be considered with a new lucidity.
scorpion.work: You can finalize a financial, legal or contractual file that asked for courage and depth from you. An inquiry, research or investigation conducted today yields a determining find. An unexpected financial support may be confirmed in the second half of the day if you stay attentive.
scorpion.energy: Intense, focused energy that needs a physical or creative outlet to find balance. A water activity or a long warm shower releases what needs to leave today.
scorpion.intuition: A message from the depths reaches you as an image, sensation or rising memory. Honor that information without fearing its intensity and you will draw lasting strength from it.
scorpion.mantra: I turn the heavy into the free.

sagittaire.author: Sibylle
sagittaire.intro: Sagittarius, this Thursday of Jupiter your ruler returns you to the heart of your true nature and reminds you why you are here. The Taurean Sun, however, invites you to embody your aspirations concretely rather than dreaming them from afar. You can place a symbolic act today that aligns your daily life with your widest horizon.
sagittaire.love: A sharing of deep values consolidates your bond more than spectacular displays today. In a couple, talk about meaning, spirituality or commitment to a cause that truly speaks to you both. Single, a meeting made on a trip or through a cultural circle opens something genuinely promising.
sagittaire.work: An international, academic or editorial opportunity may want your answer in the early afternoon today. You can say yes to a commitment that widens your territory without pulling you from your center. A training or teaching project clarifies favorably under Jupiter's eye this Thursday.
sagittaire.energy: Tonic, expansive energy that loves wide spaces and long-distance efforts. A hike, a long run or an equestrian activity recharges you fully today.
sagittaire.intuition: An overview crosses your mind early in the day and deserves to be noted urgently. Your nose for the right direction is particularly sharp and reliable today.
sagittaire.mantra: I walk toward what makes me bigger.

capricorne.author: Sibylle
capricorne.intro: Capricorn, the Moon in your sign meets Jupiter this Thursday and brings a rare expansion to your naturally reserved nature. The Taurean Sun composes harmoniously with your earth element and confirms you in your methodical choices. You can soften your rigor just enough to welcome a larger joy without losing any of your solidity.
capricorne.love: A tenderness more visible than usual brings you closer today without threatening your natural modesty. In a couple, concretely express a recognition that has slept too long inside you without being said. Single, your quiet gravity charms someone who values depth and loyalty more than any glitter.
capricorne.work: A promotion, a wider responsibility or institutional recognition sits within today's good energies. You can set up a long-term project that will inscribe itself solidly in the coming months. An authority figure or a mentor offers you a precious benevolence today, worth recognizing.
capricorne.energy: Sustained, durable energy, perfect for advancing a major project without wearing yourself out. Your body appreciates structured activity like long-distance swimming or steady hiking.
capricorne.intuition: A calm certainty settles in you on an important question that had been floating recently. That stable, low inner voice is a particularly reliable guide today.
capricorne.mantra: I build big one step at a time.

verseau.author: Sibylle
verseau.intro: Aquarius, this Jupiterian Thursday widens your human horizon and invites you to look beyond your immediate circle. The Taurean Sun nonetheless asks you to root your ideas in a tangible, touchable reality. You can build the bridge today between your future vision and a practical gesture you can do right now.
verseau.love: A friendship can take on a tender tint during an exchange today that steps outside the ordinary. In a couple, talk about a collective or community project that matters to both of you. Single, a meeting through the internet or a network can promise something durable this time around.
verseau.work: You can carry an innovation in front of a wider audience than you usually reach. Your originality finds a particularly receptive ground today under the Jupiterian influence. A humanitarian, ecological or social project deserves the best hour of your concentration.
verseau.energy: Airy, lively energy that loves new contexts and unlikely encounters. An outdoor sports session recharges you better than an indoor workout today.
verseau.intuition: An idea coming from a friend or a stranger holds the missing piece of your current puzzle. Your associative genius makes luminous links today between worlds that seemed far apart.
verseau.mantra: I link my dreams to a real gesture.

poissons.author: Sibylle
poissons.intro: Pisces, this Jupiterian Thursday awakens the widest part of your spiritual nature and gently brings you back toward the sea. The Taurean Sun roots those dreamy aspirations in tangible, savory things. You can let an elevated intuition translate today into a very simple, concrete gesture.
poissons.love: A silent but deeply felt compassion repairs today what words had not been able to say. In a couple, a shared moment of silence is worth more than a forced discussion right now. Single, a glance exchanged near water or in a soft place leaves a lasting imprint.
poissons.work: A creative, artistic or care activity finds today a happy amplification from Jupiter, your former ruler. You can place a symbolic act that will resonate further than you spontaneously imagine. A spiritual, therapeutic or charitable project asks for your engagement in the second half of the day.
poissons.energy: Fluid, sensitive energy that loves water, music and enveloping atmospheres. A swim or a long walk along a watercourse restores you today.
poissons.intuition: A sign coming from the dream world or a synchronicity confirms a direction for you today. Your fine antenna picks up information that the bare eye cannot see otherwise.
poissons.mantra: I let grace flow into my gesture.
